notes: Scores whether every piece of evidence the Genome compiler cites (styleProfileJson.voiceEvidence, contextPreviewJson.scenes[].memories) is actually grounded in memories the OWNER genuinely authorized: never another user's memory, never a memory excluded by consent scope (LOCAL_ONLY/NO_EXTERNAL_PROCESSING/SIMULATOR_AUTHORIZED), and never anything outside the capsule's persisted authorizedMemoryIds. Each scenario requests a mix of legitimate and illegitimate memoryIds; a leak would show up as an ungrounded citation, not a guess.
